4.reason: [The function 'gets' is unsafe and has been removed from the C standard library since C11; using it may cause compilation errors or warnings in modern compilers.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 0.5 , reason:  [The function 'gets' is unsafe and has been removed from the C standard library since C11; using it may cause compilation errors or warnings in modern compilers.]

31.reason: [Variable 'end' may be used uninitialized if the inner loop doesn't execute (e.g., if all digits after decimal are zero, though problem states no trailing zeros). However, more critically, logic for exponent calculation is flawed. But primary compilation issue stems from 'gets'.]
